MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem William Rauch; not reported; Plaintiff's counsel Arnold Evje;
Parties have stipulated: possession of the premises 520 South Van Ness Ave. #299 SF CA; on or before 5pm on Oct. 1, 2002; if deft. does not vacate judgment of back rent $450 and u.d. damages of $15. per day from Aug. 1, 2002 total of $1,571.00. Counsel submitted Judgment pursuant to stip. order for signature.
